title: clianthus puniceus
intro: Clianthus puniceus, also known as the New Zealand kowhai, is a flowering plant native to New Zealand, characterized by its bright yellow flowers and flat, papery seed pods. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Clianthus puniceus include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and soothe respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Clianthus puniceus can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
